CHECKLIST / MODULE 5 / LESSON 2: WEBINAR PIVOT
WEBINAR PIVOT CHECKLIST
There are 6 steps to nailing the pivot:
✓ 	1. Review what you’ve covered
• 	List what you’ve covered
• 	The benefits it gives them
✓ 	2. Commitment to moving forward
• 	Ask for specific commitments to do “x” within the next “y” time. Usually to
commit the assignments given
• 	“Doing so will get you_____”
• 	Have them acknowledge the commitment in chat
✓ 	3. “But you still need more…”
• 	“Even though everything I just taught is great, it will only take you partway
to (the transformation you need)”
• 	“You still need (list of everything they still need to have/know/do to
succeed)”
✓ 	4. “At this point you have a choice…”
• 	“You can continue to go it alone (where has that gotten you so far?)”
• 	“We’ve already accomplished more in the last x minutes than most people
accomplish in months working alone”
• 	“Or you can get the help you need to circumvent all the challenges, time
and mistakes”
✓ 	5. “So you can achieve…”
• 	Briefly state how their life will be different as a result of achieving that
transformation
✓ 	6. Ask a series of “yes” questions
• 	“Are those things you want in your life?”
• 	“Are you interested in getting there faster, better, cheaper?”
• 	“Are you ready to start getting these things in your life?”
• 	“Are you committed to doing what it takes to get them?”
